message:
fix: port-0 circuit breaker poisoning prevention (fix-merge PR #2599)

Add maybeNewCircuitBreaker that returns nil for port 0, preventing
shared breaker state from poisoning fresh inits on the machine.
Combined with #2604 host:port keying.

PR: https://github.com/steveyegge/beads/pull/2599
Co-authored-by: garitar <garitar@users.noreply.github.com>
Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 (1M context) <noreply@anthropic.com>
